values.name: Failed
values.description: workflow reached completion with Failed status.

values.name: Open
values.description: Gate status Open when ring is started/active.

values.name: Closed
values.description: Gate status Closed when ring is completed.

method.description: Different types of progression method supported.

onSuccessRing.description: Specifies the next ring to be transitioned on success.

onFailureRing.description: Specifies the next ring to be transitioned on failure.

ProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of a resource.

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The resource create request has been accepted

values.name: Waiting
values.description: Ring/Stage is waiting for its dependency.

values.name: Active
values.description: Ring/Stage started and it is in progress.

values.name: AutoPassed
values.description: Ring/Stage is passed for business reasons.

values.name: Omitted
values.description: Ring/Stage is skipped for business reasons.
